# Educational Leadership at ICS

> The Institute for Christian Studies (ICS) offers graduate programs in educational leadership rooted in a Christian worldview, based in Toronto, Canada.

## Programs

- Master of Worldview Studies in Education (MWS-E): A graduate program integrating Christian worldview with educational practice. [/mwse/]
- Master of Arts in Educational Leadership (MA-EL): A graduate degree preparing leaders for Christian school administration. [/mael/]

## Educator Certificates

- CILC — Christian Instructional Leadership Certificate [/cilc/]
- CSAC — Christian School Administration Certificate [/csac/]
- CSTC — Christian School Teaching Certificate [/cstc/]

## Key Pages

- Course Catalogue: /courses/
- Faculty: /faculty/
- Admission Requirements: /admission/
- Apply (MWS-E): /mwse-apply/
- Apply (MA-EL): /mael-apply/

## Contact

- Website: https://education.icscanada.edu
- Parent institution: https://icscanada.edu
- Email: academic-registrar@icscanada.edu
